summary: Tested Konekt B2B critical fixes for iteration 327. All features verified: (1) Pricing engine uses Pricing Tiers from Settings Hub with 35% margin for 0-100K range, (2) Product search returns A5 Notebook with correct selling_price=10800 (35% margin on base=8000), (3) QuotesPage table has 5 visible columns with min-w-[700px], (4) Settings Hub Product Categories has NO delete button, (5) Subcategories section added with input field and Enter key support, (6) CreateQuotePage renders as separate page with live preview.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All critical fixes verified: (1) Pricing engine at /app/backend/services/pricing_engine.py uses get_tier_margin() to read pricing_policy_tiers from settings_hub. Tier 1 (0-100K) has 35% total_margin_pct. (2) GET /api/public-marketplace/products?q=A5 returns A5 Notebook with base_price=8000, selling_price=10800 (35% margin). (3) QuotesPage at /admin/quotes has table with 5 columns (Quote#, Customer, Total, Status, Actions) and min-w-[700px]. (4) Settings Hub at /admin/settings-hub > Product Categories tab shows categories without delete buttons. (5) Expanded category config shows Subcategories section with input field that accepts Enter key to add subcategories. (6) CreateQuotePage at /admin/quotes/new renders as separate page with LIVE PREVIEW section.

PricingTiers.details: Settings Hub has pricing_policy_tiers with Tier 1 (0-100K) = 35%, Tier 2 (100K-500K) = 30%

ProductPricingEngine.details: A5 Notebook: base=8000, sell=10800 (35% margin). Product with base=100000 gets sell=135000 (35%)

QuotesPageTable.details: Table has 5 columns: Quote#, Customer, Total, Status, Actions. Has min-w-[700px] class

CategoryNoDelete.details: Settings Hub Product Categories has NO delete button on category items

CategorySubcategories.details: Expanded category config shows Subcategories section with input field. Enter key adds subcategory

CreateQuotePage.details: Renders at /admin/quotes/new as separate page with LIVE PREVIEW section
